parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

get.summary: Gets details of a Spark session.

delete.summary: Stops and deletes a Spark session.

post.summary: Executes a statement on a Spark session.

get.summary: Lists statements in an active session.
Gets a Spark statement from a Spark session.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Offset (in byte) which the output should begin from.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size (in byte) of the returned output.

post.summary: Resets the timeout of a session.
Acquires a high concurrency Spark session.

get.summary: Gets a high concurrency Spark session.

delete.summary: Deletes a high concurrency Spark session.

post.summary: Executes a Spark session statement in REPL.

get.summary: Lists Spark session statements in REPL.
Gets a Spark session statement in REPL.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Offset (in byte) which the output should begin from.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size (in byte) of the returned output.

post.summary: Cancels a Spark session statement in REPL.

requestId.description: ID of the request associated with the error.

errorCode.description: A specific identifier that provides information about an error condition, allowing for standardized communication between our service and its users.

message.description: A human readable representation of the error.

ErrorRelatedResource.description: The error related resource details object.

resourceId.description: Resource ID involved in the error.

resourceType.description: Resource type involved in the error.

LivySparkActivity.description: Batch or Session description when getting a list.

submitterId.description: ID of the user who submitted the batch.

submitterName.description: Name of the user who submitted the session.

state.description: State of the batch or session.

errorMessage.description: Error message if the state is in "error".

id.description: Session ID created for the session.

appId.description: The application ID of this session.

submitterId.description: ID of the user who submitted the session.

submitterName.description: Name of the user who submitted the session.

HighConcurrencySessionRequest.description: Request for acquiring a high concurrency Spark session.

HighConcurrencySessionResponse.description: Response for a high concurrency Spark session.

state.description: Public-facing high concurrency session state. Internal intermediate states are collapsed into AcquiringHighConcurrencySession.

fabricSessionStateInfo.description: State information for the underlying Livy session being provisioned. This field is only present when the session encounters an error or when session state information is available during provisioning. It is absent from most successful responses.

sessionId.description: The Livy session ID. May be absent while the session is being acquired.

replId.description: REPL ID. This field is null at session creation (202 response) and only populated once the session reaches the Idle state.

sessionTag.description: Session tag used to convey which Livy session a high concurrency session should get packed under.

HighConcurrencySessionState.description: Public-facing high concurrency session state. Internal intermediate states are collapsed into AcquiringHighConcurrencySession.

FabricSessionStateInfo.description: State information about the underlying Livy session being provisioned for the high concurrency session. This object is conditionally present in HighConcurrencySessionResponse — it appears only when there is an error or when the underlying session is actively being provisioned.
